posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Provide Previous and Current data from subitem level for dynamic values in workflow blocks.

What are you trying to achieve

Example 1: I want to create a trigger that when a subitem column changes, say a Numbers column, that I can then subtract the previous number from the item level, and then add the current number to the item level. This could even be subitem column to another subitem column.

Example 2: I want to craete a trigger that when a subitem column changes, say a status column, that I can then input the previous subitem column change onto an item column (or even to a different subitem column).
